THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUTTALL, JOAN MARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 26 RAUSCH ST, APT 9, S.F. $680.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $680.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED TILL 1/6/98 IF DEFT PAYS THE $680- ON OR BEFORE 11/20/97 5PM. PLTF WVS ANY OTHER BACK RENT & DAMAGES TILL 1/6/98. DEFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT. DEFT WAIVES CLAIMS INCL PURS 1542CC. DEFT RECEIVES $12.14 PER DAY IF MOVING PRIOR TO 1/6/98 TO BE APPLIED AS SECURITY DEPOSIT.SEE JDGMENT DETAILS
